subcodes.first_line: He designated the Center of the Covenant as the pivot of idolatry and regarded it as the Point of Negation—God forbid that such should be reckoned in numbers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مرکز میثاق را محور شرک نامید و نقطه نفی شمرد که معاذ الله در عدد چنین است
subcodes.subjects: @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria), @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
